Table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Card of table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

DBMS

Snowflake


Check constraint name of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

CKT_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3


Server validation rule of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3 (
RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE_KEY TEXT_255_ not null,
MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY TEXT_255_,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
PRICE_CURRENCY_CODE TEXT_255_,
PRICE_OFFLINE_DATE_BK DATETIME not null,
PRICE_ONLINE_DATE_BK DATETIME not null,
EVENT_PRODUCT_PRICE_BK DECIMAL not null,
USER_PRICE_GROUP_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3 primary key (RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE_KEY is
'PK for RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY is
'FK to MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.PRICE_CURRENCY_CODE is
'Currency ISO (events_products_prices_currencyIso )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.PRICE_OFFLINE_DATE_BK is
'Price Offline Date (events_products_prices_offlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.PRICE_ONLINE_DATE_BK is
'Price Online Date (events_products_prices_onlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.EVENT_PRODUCT_PRICE_BK is
'Price (events_products_prices_price )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.USER_PRICE_GROUP_BK is
'User Price Group (events_products_prices_userPriceGroup )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3.ACTIVE_FLAG is
' It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';

Column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Card of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE_KEY

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

MD5 Based Composite Hash Key Comprising of

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICES_OFFLINEDATE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICES_ONLINEDATE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICES_PRICE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICES_USERPRICEGROUP, __LOAD_TS


Check constraint name of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Unit

 

Format

 

Cannot Modify

No

Column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Card of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

No


Description of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

LEFT JOIN T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG pc

ON EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pc.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE = pc.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

 

and __LOAD_TS in <T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG.__LOAD_TS , T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG.VALID_TO)

 

Detailed logic in attached query


Check constraint name of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31

ACTIVE_FLAG

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE3

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.
